overfitting.evidence: imported key-recall probe uses the Crucible-declared task subset; no GEPA mutation or holdout reuse occurs in this slice

judge_gaming.evidence: objective is deterministic key recall from Threshold trial records; no judge-only winner is selected

scorer_parity.evidence: Crucible eval points at Threshold freeze evidence; Crucible grade parity remains outside this slice

harbor_bundle.evidence: Crucible key-recall eval declares source trials and arena_dir, but not full answer-key/scorer/oracle digests
